growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying compliance processes, the initiative aims to lower the administrative burden on businesses, potentially fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: The government intends to establish a single registration process by mid-1998.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards reducing compliance costs for businesses, which can enhance their operational efficiency and encourage new enterprise creation.
description: The Australian government intends to establish a single registration process for various taxation and regulatory bodies to reduce duplication of reporting for businesses.
source_quote: By mid-1998 the government intends to establish a single registration process for the Taxation Office, Securities Commission, Bureau of Statistics and the Insurance and Superannuation Commission.

growth_orientation_rationale: The package is designed to stimulate R&D investment and innovation, which are critical for economic growth and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The measures are set to be implemented over the next five years.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in innovation infrastructure and R&D, aiming to close the gap with OECD averages and enhance Australia's competitive position.
description: The Australian government launched a A$3 billion innovation package, Backing Australia’s Ability, aimed at enhancing the country's capacity for research, encouraging the commercialization of ideas, and developing skills over the next five years.
source_quote: Recognising the importance of innovation as a driver of sustainable economic growth and increased competitiveness, the government launched in January 2001 a A$3 billion innovation package, Backing Australia’s Ability.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying federal awards is expected to improve regulatory flexibility, potentially leading to increased productivity.
status_evidence: The legislation has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant in enhancing regulatory flexibility but does not represent a major overhaul.
description: The Australian Government has introduced legislation to simplify federal awards, aiming to define and specify allowable award matters more clearly, which is expected to enhance regulatory flexibility in workplace arrangements.
source_quote: The Workplace Relations Amendment (Award Simplification) Bill 2002, if passed, will more clearly define and specify allowable award matters and incidental matters.

growth_orientation_rationale: By addressing skill shortages and enhancing workforce capabilities, this initiative is expected to improve productivity and support economic growth.
status_evidence: The strategy has been executed and is actively addressing skill shortages.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to improve skills in the workforce, although it is not as transformative as the higher education funding reform.
description: The Australian Government launched the National Skills Shortages Strategy to address skill shortages in key industries, incorporating new approaches to apprenticeships and encouraging regional collaboration.
source_quote: In 2004, the government launched the National Skills Shortages Strategy to tackle skill shortages in key industries throughout the country.

growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to improve water access and market efficiency, which can enhance productivity in various sectors.
status_evidence: The NWI has been fully implemented as part of Australia's water reform agenda.
importance_rationale: The NWI represents a significant structural change in water management policy.
description: The National Water Initiative (NWI) was agreed upon to enhance water reform in Australia, focusing on improving the security of water access entitlements and encouraging the expansion of water markets and trading.
source_quote: The NWI aims to improve the security of water access entitlements, ensure ecosystems’ health and encourage the expansion of water markets and trading.

growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on health, education, and training is expected to enhance the skills and capabilities of the workforce, driving innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The agenda has been actively pursued and implemented by COAG since its agreement.
importance_rationale: The National Reform Agenda represents a comprehensive approach to reforming human capital development in Australia.
description: In February 2006, COAG agreed to collaborate on the implementation of a new National Reform Agenda that includes a human capital agenda focusing on health, education, and training, alongside traditional areas of competition and regulatory reform.
source_quote: In February 2006, COAG agreed to collaborate on the implementation of a new National Reform Agenda to enhance productivity and labour force participation.

growth_orientation_rationale: This plan aims to enhance water resource management, which is vital for sustainable development and economic growth.
status_evidence: The plan has been implemented as part of the government's strategy for water resource management.
importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant investment in water management infrastructure.
description: The Water for the Future plan, with a budget of AUD12.9 billion over ten years, aims to improve the governance of the Murray-Darling Basin and develop an integrated management system for water resources, including a national information system for water data.
source_quote: The new national plan, Water for the Future, aims to improve the governance of the MDB and to develop an integrated management of the Basin.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving digital infrastructure and services, the reform aims to enhance efficiency in public service delivery and support innovation in the private sector.
status_evidence: Key initiatives of the Digital Business Plan were announced and funding allocated in September 2020.
importance_rationale: The Digital Business Plan represents a significant investment in digital infrastructure, which is essential for modernizing public services and fostering innovation.
description: The Government announced the AUD800 million Digital Business Plan to enhance digital government services, including the development of a Digital Identity system and the Modernising Business Registers program.
source_quote: In September 2020, the Government announced the AUD800m Digital Business Plan.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing equity investment to SMEs, the fund aims to alleviate financing constraints, thereby supporting their growth and innovation potential.
status_evidence: The government launched the AUD540 million Australian Business Growth Fund.
importance_rationale: This fund represents a significant but narrower initiative aimed at supporting SMEs, which are crucial for innovation and economic growth.
description: The Australian government launched the AUD540 million Australian Business Growth Fund to ease financing constraints for SMEs through equity investment, with a focus on established firms rather than high-growth startups.
source_quote: In 2020 the government launched the AUD540 million Australian Business Growth Fund with AUD100 million of public funds and the remainder from six banks.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating easier restructuring, the reform helps viable firms to survive and adapt, thereby supporting overall economic productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The new restructuring and liquidation processes have been established and are in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the insolvency framework for SMEs, which is crucial for maintaining entrepreneurship and innovation in the economy.
description: The Australian government has introduced a special restructuring process and simplified liquidation process for incorporated SMEs, aimed at reducing costs and encouraging earlier action to preserve economic value.
source_quote: The government has created a special restructuring process and simplified liquidation process for incorporated SMEs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Easing regulations can improve access to capital for startups, fostering innovation and growth in the entrepreneurial sector.
status_evidence: The Committee has recommended adjusting public equity regulations to make it easier for company founders to scale back their investment.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses barriers to capital access for startups, which is crucial for their growth and innovation potential.
description: The Australian government is considering adjustments to public equity regulations to facilitate easier scaling back of investments by company founders, which could enhance access to capital for innovative startups.
source_quote: The Committee has recommended adjusting public equity regulations to make it easier for company founders to scale back their investment.

growth_orientation_rationale: This investment is expected to improve disaster management capabilities, thereby enhancing resilience and reducing economic losses from climate-related events.
status_evidence: The investment was included in the 2021-22 Budget.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in infrastructure aimed at improving climate resilience, which is crucial for mitigating the economic impacts of natural disasters.
description: The Australian government announced an investment of AUD209.7 million to establish the Australian Climate Service, aimed at enhancing the country's capacity to manage and adapt to natural disasters.
source_quote: The government announced in the 2021-22 Budget investment of AUD209.7 million to establish the Australian Climate Service.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing job matching and training services, the new model aims to improve employment outcomes and productivity, fostering economic growth.
status_evidence: The government is adopting a New Employment Services Model that will replace the existing Jobactive programme from 2022.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of employment services, aiming to modernize the approach to job matching and training, which is critical for addressing unemployment and enhancing workforce skills.
description: The Australian government is adopting a New Employment Services Model to replace the existing Jobactive programme, emphasizing digital services for job matching and training.
source_quote: The government is adopting a New Employment Services Model that will replace the existing Jobactive programme from 2022.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing pay transparency can help reduce gender pay gaps, leading to better economic outcomes for women and overall productivity.
status_evidence: The Federal government prohibited pay secrecy clauses and introduced new legislation.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how gender pay disparities are addressed in the workplace, with potential long-term impacts on gender equality.
description: The Federal government has introduced new legislation requiring firms with more than 100 employees to publicly report on gender pay gaps and other gender-related indicators.
source_quote: In 2022, the Federal government prohibited pay secrecy clauses in employment contracts and introduced new legislation that requires firms with more than 100 employees to publicly report on a range of areas including gender pay gaps.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform incentivizes emissions reductions, potentially fostering innovation in low-carbon technologies and practices within the industrial sector.
package_name: 2023 Climate Change and Emissions Reduction Strategy
status_evidence: The reforms became effective in July 2023.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the existing emissions regulation framework, aiming to achieve ambitious national emissions reduction targets and drive innovation in the industrial sector.
description: The Safeguard Mechanism was reformed to align with Australia's revised emissions reduction targets, introducing below-baseline crediting and resetting baselines to encourage greater emissions reductions from industrial facilities.
source_quote: The Safeguard Mechanism (Crediting) Amendment Bill 2023 enacted a number of reforms to the Safeguard Mechanism, which have been in place since 1 July 2023.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing tax rates on high superannuation balances, the reform aims to enhance fiscal sustainability and reduce inequities in the tax system, potentially leading to more efficient allocation of resources.
status_evidence: The government announced its intention to restrict the concessional tax rates.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the tax treatment of superannuation, targeting high-income earners and addressing fiscal sustainability, which has broad implications for the economy.
description: The Australian government announced its intention to restrict concessional tax rates on superannuation earnings for individuals with balances exceeding AUD3 million, increasing the tax rate from 15% to 30%. This reform aims to address fiscal sustainability and equity in the tax system.
source_quote: The authorities have recently announced their intention to restrict the concessional tax rates by increasing the headline tax rate from 15% to 30% on earnings in superannuation accounts with balances exceeding AUD3 million.

growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to improve land and water management, which can enhance agricultural productivity and environmental sustainability.
package_name: National Action Plan for Salinity and Water Quality
status_evidence: The National Action Plan for Salinity and Water Quality is described as a recently-released strategy.
importance_rationale: This plan represents a significant shift in national policy towards a coordinated approach to a critical environmental issue, with substantial funding and long-term goals.
description: The National Action Plan for Salinity and Water Quality represents Australia's first targeted national strategy to address dryland salinity, supported by A$1.4 billion in public financing over seven years.
source_quote: The recently-released National Action Plan for Salinity and Water Quality is the first concerted and targeted national strategy to address the salinity problem, in particular dryland salinity, supported by a A$1.4 billion public financing.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the VET system is expected to improve the skill level of the workforce, supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The reforms are in place and are being executed to enhance the VET system.
importance_rationale: These reforms are significant but do not represent a major overhaul of the system.
description: Australia's vocational education and training (VET) system is being enhanced to better respond to the skill needs of a rapidly changing economy. This includes the creation of the National Workforce Development Fund to support employers in providing training to new and existing workers, and the National Partnership Agreement on Skills Reform to improve the efficiency and quality of VET.
source_quote: The budget has also announced the creation of the National Workforce Development Fund (AUD700 million), supporting employers (under a co-contribution model based on the size of their enterprise) to provide training to new workers and up-skill existing workers.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging competition in public service procurement can lead to more innovative solutions and improved service delivery, enhancing overall productivity.
status_evidence: The initiative was part of the broader National Innovation and Science Agenda announced in 2015.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant shift in how public services are procured, aiming to foster innovation and improve service quality.
description: The Australian government aims to enhance innovation in public services by opening up procurement to more bidders and further developing digital government services.
source_quote: Encourage more innovation in public services by opening up procurement to more bidders and further development of digital government services.

growth_orientation_rationale: These reforms promote competition in the transport sector, potentially lowering prices and improving service quality for consumers.
status_evidence: Reforms have been finalized in New South Wales and the Australian Capital Territory to accommodate ride-sharing.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant adjustment to existing regulations, allowing for greater competition in the transport sector, which is economically relevant given the size of the market.
description: Australia's state-by-state reforms to accommodate ride-sharing services legalize these services and introduce regulatory standards, allowing them to compete with traditional taxi services on a more equal basis.
source_quote: States have been bringing in reforms that allow both traditional taxi services and ride-sharing to coexist.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging innovation in public services can lead to improved efficiency and effectiveness, contributing positively to overall economic productivity.
status_evidence: The authorities have a welcomed degree of commitment to boosting innovation in the public sector.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a comprehensive approach to enhancing public sector productivity through innovation, which is crucial for improving service delivery and economic performance.
description: The Australian government is promoting public service innovation to enhance productivity and service quality, focusing on empowering the workforce and generating innovative ideas.
source_quote: The authorities have a welcomed degree of commitment to boosting innovation in the public sector.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating industry placements, the initiative aims to improve the skills and employability of researchers, thereby enhancing innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The proposal for a nationally consistent approach is welcome.
importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant step towards improving the integration of research and industry, which is essential for fostering innovation.
description: The proposal for a nationally consistent approach to industry placements for higher degree research students aims to reduce complexity and enhance collaboration between universities and industry.
source_quote: The proposal by the ACOLA review for a nationally consistent approach is welcome.

growth_orientation_rationale: Creating a national research institution can enhance the quality of research and evidence used in policy-making, leading to better educational outcomes.
status_evidence: The proposal for the institution has been made and is under consideration.
importance_rationale: While important, the establishment of this institution does not represent a major overhaul of the research infrastructure.
description: Australia should establish an independent institution to coordinate, source, and generate the development of a national research and evidence base to support more evidence-based decision-making in school education.
source_quote: Australia should establish an independent institution to coordinate, source and generate the development of a national research and evidence base to support more evidence-based decision making in school education.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying the Act would reduce compliance costs and improve lenders' confidence in using intangible assets as collateral, thereby facilitating access to finance for innovative firms.
status_evidence: The government is considering its response to the 2015 statutory review.
importance_rationale: The proposed reforms aim to address significant barriers faced by innovative firms in accessing finance, which is critical for their growth and development.
description: The Australian government is considering reforms to simplify the Personal Property Securities Act to improve its effectiveness for innovative firms with intangible assets, which could enhance access to credit.
source_quote: The independent statutory review of the Act highlighted the need to simplify the Act to generate more predictable outcomes, which would give lenders greater confidence.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for clean energy technologies is expected to enhance innovation in the energy sector, leading to improved efficiency and reduced emissions.
status_evidence: The government has indicated plans to scale up public funding for clean energy technologies.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in public investment aimed at fostering innovation in clean energy, which is crucial for meeting climate targets.
description: Australia plans to scale up and refocus public funding towards the development and demonstration of clean energy and energy-efficiency technologies to support the transition to net zero.
source_quote: Consider scaling up and refocusing public funding towards the development and demonstration of clean energy and energy-efficiency technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing participation of women in STEM fields can lead to a more skilled workforce, driving innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government is currently undertaking a 'Diversity in STEM' review.
importance_rationale: This initiative addresses a significant gap in gender representation in STEM, which is crucial for future economic competitiveness.
description: The Australian government is undertaking a 'Diversity in STEM' review to make recommendations on how to support women and other underrepresented groups in STEM education and careers.
source_quote: The government is currently undertaking a 'Diversity in STEM' review that will make recommendations on how the government can support women, and other underrepresented groups, to participate in STEM education, careers and industries.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing guarantees for renewable projects, the scheme is likely to stimulate private investment, thereby enhancing the renewable energy sector and contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The government also recently announced a Capacity Investment Scheme, a guarantee scheme to support the development of renewable generation and storage.
importance_rationale: This scheme is a significant step towards enhancing renewable energy capacity, although it is part of a broader strategy rather than a standalone major reform.
description: The government has announced a Capacity Investment Scheme, a guarantee scheme to support the development of renewable generation and storage, expected to unlock AUD 10 billion in investment.
source_quote: The government also recently announced a Capacity Investment Scheme, a guarantee scheme to support the development of renewable generation and storage which is expected to unlock AUD 10 billion in investment.

growth_orientation_rationale: By addressing climate change impacts, the plan aims to enhance the resilience of the energy sector, potentially leading to more stable energy supply and improved economic productivity.
status_evidence: A National Adaptation Plan, announced in the 2023-24 Budget, is currently under development.
importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant step towards addressing climate change in the energy sector, which is crucial for Australia's transition to net zero.
description: The Australian government is developing a National Adaptation Plan to address climate change impacts specifically in the energy sector, which will identify priorities and coordinate further action.
source_quote: A National Adaptation Plan, announced in the 2023-24 Budget, is currently under development.

growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering the barriers to entry for new businesses, the reform is expected to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The Start-up Promotion Law has been enacted and is in effect.
importance_rationale: The Start-up Promotion Law represents a significant structural change in the regulatory framework for new businesses, enhancing the startup ecosystem and fostering innovation.
description: Austria has introduced the Start-up Promotion Law, which significantly reduced the administrative costs associated with setting up new enterprises, aiming to foster a more conducive environment for startups.
source_quote: Austria has set a European benchmark by introduction of the Start-up Promotion Law (Neugründungsförderungsge-setz) in 2000 which substantially reduced the administrative cost of setting up new enterprises.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to integrate various dimensions of sustainable development, potentially leading to more efficient resource allocation and improved economic outcomes.
status_evidence: The strategy was adopted and is being implemented through annual work programmes.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant effort to coordinate and integrate various policy areas, although its effectiveness and coverage are still being evaluated.
description: The Austrian Federal Government adopted a National Strategy for Sustainable Development, identifying key objectives for social, economic, and environmental dimensions, with implementation based on annual work programmes and progress monitored through indicators.
source_quote: In April 2002 the Austrian Federal Government adopted a National Strategy for Sustainable Development identifying 20 key objectives covering social, economic and environmental dimensions of sustainable development.

growth_orientation_rationale: The tool aims to enhance cost awareness and decision-making in waste management, potentially leading to more efficient resource use and environmental benefits.
status_evidence: The tool has been developed and is already applied in one state (Styria).
importance_rationale: While the tool is a useful resource for municipalities, its impact may be limited to specific regions and does not represent a broad systemic change.
description: The Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry, Environment and Water Management developed a Waste Management Tool to support municipalities in managing waste more efficiently, providing a decision support system for evaluating different waste management measures.
source_quote: The development of this instrument has been commissioned by the Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry, Environment and Water Management and was elaborated from 1996 to 2004 as a decision support tool for the judgment of different measures in the field of management of municipal waste in Austria.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of healthcare delivery, the ELGA system is expected to improve health outcomes and reduce costs in the long run.
status_evidence: The first ELGA application will be run in 2011.
importance_rationale: The ELGA system represents a significant overhaul of health information management in Austria, with potential widespread impacts on healthcare delivery and patient outcomes.
description: Austria is developing the ELGA system, a publicly financed infrastructure for electronic health records, aimed at improving patient care by making health-related information centrally available to providers and patients.
source_quote: The government made progress in implementing individual electronic health records (the ELGA system).

growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to enhance access to capital for startups, fostering innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The programme has been launched and is operational.
importance_rationale: While not a major reform, it represents a significant effort to bolster the startup ecosystem.
description: A new programme, Jungunternehmeroffensive, was initiated in 2013 to promote venture and equity capital provision for new firms, supporting the startup ecosystem in Austria.
source_quote: Venture and other equity capital provision for new firms as promoted by new programmes (Jungunternehmeroffensive initiated in 2013) should be encouraged.

growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to enhance the digital capabilities of firms, which can lead to increased productivity and competitiveness in the market.
status_evidence: The Digital Roadmap was introduced at the federal government level.
importance_rationale: The Digital Roadmap represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing Austria's digital infrastructure and capabilities, which is crucial for maintaining competitiveness in a rapidly evolving global economy.
description: Austria introduced a 'Digital Roadmap' in 2017 at the federal government level to accelerate digital transitions and anticipate their disruptive impacts.
source_quote: A 'Digital Roadmap' introduced in 2017 at the federal government level reflects this awareness and the shared policy objective of accelerating the digital transitions.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance digital infrastructure which is expected to support innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The national climate strategy was adopted and is in force.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in Austria's approach to climate and digitalisation.
description: Austria adopted a new national climate strategy in 2018, which includes a Digitalisation Strategy aimed at enhancing digital infrastructure and fostering collaboration among stakeholders to achieve greenhouse gas emission targets in line with the Paris Accord, including a goal for 100% renewable electricity generation by 2030.
source_quote: In May 2018, the government issued a new Climate and Energy Strategy as required by the EU from all member states.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving market transparency is expected to enhance investor confidence, which can lead to increased investment and innovation.
status_evidence: The supervisory authority has been established to enhance market operations.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant in promoting transparency but does not represent a fundamental change in the regulatory framework.
description: The establishment of an independent stock market supervisory authority is proposed to promote market transparency and boost investor confidence.
source_quote: The setting up of an independent stock market supervisory authority is an important next step in promoting market transparency and boosting investor confidence.

growth_orientation_rationale: The package aims to enhance access to capital and support for start-ups, which is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The Start-up Package was officially launched and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The Start-up Package represents a significant overhaul of support mechanisms for start-ups in Austria.
description: Austria introduced a comprehensive Start-up Package in 2019, which includes additional risk-finance through a public Digitalization and Growth Fund that co-invests in start-ups alongside private venture-capital funds, new subsidies, regulatory sandboxes, and educational programs to enhance the startup ecosystem and support innovative firms.
source_quote: A Start-up Package was introduced May in 2019, with i) additional risk-finance through a public Digitalization and Growth Fund (which will co-invest in start-ups together with private venture-capital funds) and ii) more credit guarantees.

growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance digital connectivity, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The Broadband Strategy was adopted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant initiative but is part of a broader digital infrastructure effort.
description: Austria's 'Broadband Strategy 2030' was adopted to facilitate new entries and stimulate competition in broadband services, aiming for a nationwide 5G network by 2025.
source_quote: A 'Broadband Strategy 2030' was adopted in February 2019.

growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of the tax on innovation and business operations is ambiguous.
status_evidence: The digital taxation initiative has been announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The initiative is a minor adjustment in tax policy rather than a significant reform.
description: Austria announced a digital taxation initiative, implementing a 5% tax on online advertising revenues from companies with significant global sales, starting in 2020.
source_quote: Austria announced a digital taxation initiative. A 5% tax rate will, beginning in 2020, apply to online advertising revenues from companies generating global sales of EUR 750 million.

growth_orientation_rationale: This law aims to drive innovation in renewable energy technologies, which is essential for achieving climate goals and fostering economic growth.
status_evidence: The Renewables Expansion Law was adopted in 2020 to increase the share of carbon-free electricity.
importance_rationale: This law represents a fundamental shift in energy policy, promoting significant investments in renewable energy and innovation.
description: The Austrian government has introduced a 'Renewables Expansion Law' as part of its strategy to increase the share of carbon-free electricity to 100% by 2030, which includes significant investments in research and innovation.
source_quote: A new 'Renewables Expansion Law' was adopted in 2020 to increase the share of carbon-free electricity to 100% by 2030.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital infrastructure is expected to facilitate innovation and improve productivity across various sectors of the economy.
status_evidence: The strategy has been initiated to improve broadband connectivity across Austria.
importance_rationale: This initiative is a significant step towards improving digital infrastructure, which is essential for supporting innovation and economic growth.
description: Austria's Broadband Strategy 2030 aims to achieve nationwide investments in Gigabit connectivity, addressing the challenges posed by the country's topography and population density.
source_quote: The Broadband Strategy 2030 aims at considerable nation-wide investments in Gigabit connectivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: The subsidies incentivize businesses to invest in sustainable and digital projects, which can enhance productivity and innovation.
status_evidence: The government has provided substantial funding for these subsidies.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant adjustment to existing investment support mechanisms, targeting key areas for economic recovery and future growth.
description: Austria introduced direct public subsidies to business investment, increasing the standard subsidy from 7% to 14% for investments in greening, digitalisation, and health projects, excluding climate-damaging investments.
source_quote: New investments have benefitted from a standard 7% subsidy, which was doubled to 14% for investments in the areas of greening, digitalisation, and health projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform aims to enhance the business environment for start-ups, potentially increasing their growth and contribution to the economy.
status_evidence: The new corporate form is underway to help start-ups scale up more effectively.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the corporate landscape, aimed at fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
description: Austria is implementing a new corporate form to facilitate the scaling-up of start-ups and young firms, which combines aspects of stock corporation law and limited liability law, allowing for less bureaucratic founding procedures and greater employee participation.
source_quote: A new corporate form is under way and should help a faster scaling-up of start-ups and young firms.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digitalisation is expected to improve productivity and competitiveness among firms, particularly SMEs.
status_evidence: Digitalisation is a key priority for the Austrian government and a central element in the Next Generation EU package.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a comprehensive approach to enhancing the digital capabilities of the economy, which is crucial for future growth.
description: The Austrian government is prioritizing digitalisation as part of its strategy to establish Austria as a leading business location, with a focus on improving the adoption of key digital technologies among firms.
source_quote: Digitalisation is a key priority for the Austrian government and a central element in the Next Generation EU package.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving financial literacy can enhance understanding of financing options, thereby fostering investment and innovation among entrepreneurs.
status_evidence: The strategy was disclosed to the public in October 2021.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant effort to enhance financial literacy, which is crucial for improving access to capital and supporting entrepreneurship.
description: Austria introduced a new national financial literacy strategy aimed at increasing financial literacy and raising awareness among entrepreneurs about alternative financing options available in the capital market.
source_quote: In October 2021, a new national financial literacy strategy for Austria was disclosed to the public.

growth_orientation_rationale: By encouraging older workers to stay in the workforce longer, the reform can enhance labor market participation and reduce the financial burden on the pension system.
status_evidence: The reform to abolish deduction-free early retirement pensions has been officially announced and is set to take effect.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in retirement policy aimed at improving labor market dynamics and sustainability of the pension system.
description: Austria is implementing a reform to abolish deduction-free early retirement pensions, which will take effect on December 31, 2021. This reform aims to encourage older workers to remain in the labor force longer, thereby contributing to a more sustainable retirement system.
source_quote: The recent reform from December 2020, which abolished a pathway to early retirement for workers of certain occupations without deductions, was a step in the right direction.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages public transport use, which can reduce traffic congestion and emissions, contributing to a more sustainable economy.
status_evidence: The KlimaTicket was launched and has gained a significant number of subscribers.
importance_rationale: The KlimaTicket represents a significant initiative to promote sustainable transport, with potential long-term impacts on commuting patterns and urban mobility.
description: Austria introduced the KlimaTicket, a nationwide public transport ticket that allows unlimited travel across the country, aimed at promoting the use of public transport and reducing reliance on cars.
source_quote: In October 2021, Austria introduced a nationwide climate ticket – the 'KlimaTicket', which offers almost unlimited public transport use across the country.

growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to stimulate private investment in innovative startups, enhancing the overall startup ecosystem and fostering economic growth.
status_evidence: The fund was established and is operational as of June 2023.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the fund represents a significant step towards enhancing the startup ecosystem in Austria, although the scale of funding is smaller compared to similar initiatives in other OECD countries.
description: In June 2023, Austria established a new state-financed venture capital fund, the aws Gründungsfonds II, aimed at investing in young, innovative companies during their startup and growth phases. The fund is designed to leverage private investments, with a total target of EUR 500 million, although the initial public funding of EUR 72 million is relatively modest compared to similar initiatives in other countries.
source_quote: In June 2023 a new state-financed venture capital fund (aws Gründungsfonds II: 'Startup Fund') was established with a duration of min. 10 years.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages the use of renewable energy in electric vehicle charging, promoting sustainability and innovation in the energy sector.
component_name: Carbon Credit Mechanism for EV Charging
status_evidence: Austria has implemented a credit mechanism whereby the electricity used to charge EVs can be sold as carbon credits.
importance_rationale: This mechanism enhances the economic viability of renewable energy use in electric vehicle charging, contributing to broader climate goals.
description: Austria has introduced a credit mechanism allowing the electricity used to charge electric vehicles at public or private charging stations to be sold as carbon credits, incentivizing the use of renewable energy for EV charging.
source_quote: Austria is also one of the four European countries which has implemented (starting in 2023) a credit mechanism whereby the electricity used to charge EVs at public or private charging stations can be sold to intermediaries as carbon credits.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in health services and digitalisation can enhance productivity and improve health outcomes, contributing to economic growth.
package_name: 2024 Health and Long-term Care Reform Package
status_evidence: A reform package for 2024-2028 was presented in November 2023.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in health infrastructure and services, which is crucial for addressing long-term care challenges and improving public health.
description: A reform package for 2024-2028 was presented to invest EUR 14 billion for health and long-term care, focusing on digitalisation of health services and strengthening the ambulatory sector.
source_quote: A reform package for 2024-2028 was presented in November 2023 to invest EUR 14 billion for health and long-term care.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform aims to lower barriers for startups, potentially increasing entrepreneurial activity and innovation in the economy.
status_evidence: The Flexible Company was introduced as part of the startup package reform.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the legal framework for startups, which can enhance the business environment for new ventures.
description: Austria introduced the Flexible Company - 'Flexible Kapitalgesellschaft' as a new legal form of corporation specifically designed to meet the needs of startups, facilitating the establishment of new companies.
source_quote: In 2024, Austria introduced the Flexible Company - 'Flexible Kapitalgesellschaft' as a new legal form of corporation specially oriented to the needs of startups.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating carbon storage is expected to enhance the development of green technologies, thereby supporting innovation in the industrial sector.
status_evidence: The review of the ban is part of the Climate Ministry's commissioned feasibility study.
importance_rationale: The review represents a significant policy shift that could enable the deployment of critical technologies for emissions reduction, impacting the industrial sector's innovation landscape.
description: Austria is reviewing its ban on the development of permanent geological storage of carbon dioxide, which has been in place since 2011. This review is part of a broader strategy to enhance carbon capture and storage technologies, which are crucial for decarbonising the steel and cement sectors.
source_quote: Austria has banned projects to develop permanent geological storage of carbon dioxide since 2011... The legally-scheduled evaluation of the ban every five years... should provide the chance to revive discussion on the potential for storage in Austria.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure is expected to enhance productivity and innovation by facilitating better access to high-speed internet, particularly in underserved areas.

source_quote: Austria’s 2030 broadband strategy, ‘Broadband Austria 2030’, plans for public investments in areas of low density and higher incentives for private investment.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure is expected to enhance connectivity, which can drive productivity and innovation across various sectors.

source_quote: The downsides of the early streaming of students into 'academic' and 'general' routes at the excessively young age of 10 are now recognised in Austria.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital infrastructure is expected to facilitate innovation, improve productivity, and support the digital economy.
