source_quote: The National Recovery and Resilience Plan allocates additional resources for schools. Efforts should focus on modernizing infrastructure, as well as supporting the training and motivation of teachers.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills and capacity of public officials, the reform is expected to improve public service delivery and overall governance, which can foster economic growth.
status_evidence: The NRRP includes measures to hire new public officials and reform recruitment processes.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the public sector aimed at improving its effectiveness, which is crucial for Italy's economic recovery and growth.
description: Italy's National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP) aims to modernise the public administration by financing the hiring of thousands of new public officials and reforming candidate selection to attract individuals with exceptional skills.
source_quote: The NRRP finances the hiring of thousands of new public officials to fill capacity gaps across the public administration.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying regulations can enhance the efficiency of public administration, reduce bureaucratic burdens, and promote a more conducive environment for economic activities.
status_evidence: The NRRP focuses on improving the effectiveness of regulations at preventing fraud or corruption.
importance_rationale: This reform is a major initiative to overhaul public administration processes, which is essential for improving governance and economic performance.
description: The NRRP includes reforms to simplify public administrative laws and regulations, aiming to improve the effectiveness of regulations and streamline processes across all levels of government.
source_quote: Reforms to public administrative law and regulation, public procurement, and competition are the focus of the NRRP.

growth_orientation_rationale: The investment in renewable energy and energy efficiency is expected to enhance productivity and support sustainable economic growth.
component_name: Public Investment in Energy and Climate
status_evidence: The NRRP has been actively implemented since 2021.
importance_rationale: The NRRP represents a significant structural change in public investment strategy.
description: The National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP) aims to address structural weaknesses in the Italian economy by providing financial support for public investment, particularly in digital and green transitions, with around 85 billion EUR allocated for the energy and climate transition, focusing on investments in renewable energy, hydrogen development, and energy efficiency improvements in buildings.
source_quote: Italy’s National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP) features public expenditure worth around 85 billion EUR, or almost 5% of annual GDP, for the energy and climate transition.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing competition is likely to lead to increased efficiency and innovation in the services sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been actively implemented since 2022.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in how public goods are allocated.
description: The competition reform legislated in 2022 aims to reduce entry barriers in services by mandating competitive auctions for public goods, which is expected to enhance competition and productivity in the services sector.
source_quote: The competition reform legislated in 2022 goes some way towards reducing entry barriers in services.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving judicial efficiency is likely to enhance the business environment and attract investment.
status_evidence: The reform has been actively implemented since 2023.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant overhaul of the judicial system.
description: The ongoing civil justice reform aims to enhance the efficiency of the judicial system through digitalisation, streamlined procedures, and improved performance incentives for judges, which is expected to support investment and productivity growth.
source_quote: The ongoing civil justice reform constitutes a major step towards a more efficient judicial system.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying permitting processes is expected to accelerate renewable energy projects and enhance workforce skills, supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The proposal has been announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The restructuring of the NRRP is significant but does not represent a complete overhaul.
description: The Italian government proposed to restructure its NRRP to include a new REPowerEU Chapter, focusing on simplifying renewable energy permitting and enhancing green skills in the workforce.
source_quote: The European Commission recently endorsed a proposal by the Italian government to restructure its NRRP and equip it with a new REPowerEU Chapter.

growth_orientation_rationale: Aligning taxes with emissions content is expected to incentivize cleaner technologies and reduce environmental impact.
status_evidence: The tax reform has been approved and is set to be implemented in 2024.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in the taxation system related to environmental policy.
description: Italy has approved a tax reform aimed at aligning fossil fuel excise taxes more closely with fossil fuel emissions content, which includes raising excises where they are low compared to emissions content. This reform is intended to reduce emissions and improve the efficiency of carbon pricing.
source_quote: The government recently approved a tax reform to be carried out within the next two years.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining permitting processes is expected to facilitate faster deployment of renewable energy projects, contributing to economic growth.
status_evidence: The reform has been actively implemented since 2024.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant but does not represent a complete overhaul of the permitting system.
description: The suitable areas reform aims to streamline the permitting process for renewable energy projects by allowing smaller projects in designated suitable areas to be authorized with lighter procedures. This reform is expected to accelerate the deployment of renewable energy capacity in Italy.
source_quote: The suitable areas reform establishes that renewable power plants with capacity below 10 MW to be built in suitable areas can be authorised with the tacit consent principle.

growth_orientation_rationale: The absence of specialized venture capital institutions limits the capacity of SMEs to innovate, which can negatively impact overall economic growth.
status_evidence: The issue has been recognized and is currently affecting the innovation landscape.
importance_rationale: Addressing the venture capital gap is significant for fostering innovation but does not represent a comprehensive reform.
description: The lack of institutions specialized in the financing of venture capital has hindered the ability of small- and medium-sized firms to innovate and start new lines of business.
source_quote: The lack of institutions specialized in the financing of venture capital may have affected the ability of small- and medium-sized firms to start up new lines of business.

growth_orientation_rationale: Attracting skilled researchers back to Italy can enhance the country's innovation capacity and contribute to economic growth.
status_evidence: Tax incentives on the repatriation of researchers have been made permanent.
importance_rationale: The permanent nature of these incentives represents a significant commitment to enhancing human capital in Italy.
description: The Italian government has made permanent tax incentives for the repatriation of researchers, aimed at attracting talent back to Italy.
source_quote: Tax incentives on the repatriation of researchers have been made permanent.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to capital for SMEs, the minibond initiative is expected to enhance their financial stability and capacity for innovation.
status_evidence: Tax advantages and streamlined procedures have been introduced for minibonds.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant step towards improving SME access to finance, which is crucial for fostering innovation and growth.
description: The Italian government has introduced tax advantages and streamlined procedures for unlisted SMEs to issue minibonds, aiming to improve access to capital markets for small and medium enterprises.
source_quote: Tax advantages and streamlined procedures to issue bonds by unlisted SMEs (minibonds) have been introduced.

growth_orientation_rationale: The productivity board aims to enhance policy coherence and effectiveness, which can lead to improved productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: Italy has committed to establishing a productivity board.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a productivity board represents a significant step towards enhancing productivity governance, which is crucial for long-term economic performance.
description: Italy has committed to establishing a productivity board to provide advice on productivity-related matters, promote public understanding of reforms, and engage with stakeholders.
source_quote: Italy has committed to establishing a productivity board to provide advice to the government on matters related to productivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: By addressing skill gaps and rejuvenating the workforce, this initiative is expected to enhance public service delivery and support economic recovery.
status_evidence: The plan outlines recruitment campaigns targeting needed skills.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses critical skill shortages in the public sector, which is essential for effective governance and service delivery, making it a significant structural change.
description: The National Recovery and Resilience Plan includes measures to recruit thousands of public servants to fill skill gaps across various public functions, particularly in digital technologies, to rejuvenate the ageing workforce.
source_quote: The National Recovery and Resilience Plan provides for the recruitment of thousands of public servants to fill skill gaps across different public functions.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating stock options, the reform aims to align employee interests with company performance, potentially enhancing innovation and growth in start-ups.
status_evidence: The government introduced a new stock option system in 1995.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards enhancing the startup ecosystem by providing a mechanism for incentivizing employees, although it is limited to a select group of companies.
description: The Japanese government introduced a new stock option system in 1995, aimed at liberalizing the use of stock options for companies, particularly benefiting start-ups approved by MITI.
source_quote: The government introduced a new stock option system in 1995, but it is applicable only to companies approved by MITI.

growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining bankruptcy procedures, the reform aims to reduce exit costs for failing firms, thereby enabling more efficient resource allocation and encouraging new market entries.
status_evidence: The Ministry of Justice has just announced that it will present revisions to the Composition Law in 1999.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses significant inefficiencies in the bankruptcy system, which can enhance the overall business environment and support economic recovery.
description: The Ministry of Justice announced plans to revise the Composition Law to allow firms to seek settlements with creditors before submitting a rehabilitation plan, facilitating smoother bankruptcy processes.
source_quote: The Ministry of Justice has just announced that it will present revisions to the Composition Law in 1999.

growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing barriers to entry for new retail chains, the reform is expected to enhance competition and consumer choice, potentially leading to increased economic activity.
package_name: Large Scale Retail Store Law Reform
status_evidence: A new law will be implemented by June 2000.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in retail policy, aimed at fostering competition and innovation in the retail sector, which is crucial for economic dynamism.
description: The government announced a new law to eliminate the use of supply/demand adjustment mechanisms for large retail stores, requiring local governments to apply transparent criteria for store approvals.
source_quote: A new law will be implemented by June 2000; it will eliminate the use of supply/demand adjustment mechanisms and will require local governments to apply transparent criteria.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform is expected to enhance the startup ecosystem by allowing more flexibility in retail operations, thus fostering innovation and competition.
status_evidence: The new law has been successfully implemented and is in effect.
importance_rationale: The replacement of the law represents a significant change in the regulatory framework affecting retail and startups.
description: Japan replaced the Large-scale Retail Store Law with the Large-scale Retail Store Location Law, shifting regulatory responsibility to local governments and eliminating the objective of balancing supply and demand.
source_quote: The Large-scale Retail Store Law was replaced in 2000 by the 'Large-scale Retail Store Location Law', which is aimed at protecting the local living environment.

growth_orientation_rationale: Creating competitive venture security markets is expected to stimulate investment in start-ups and foster innovation.
status_evidence: The venture security markets were established and are currently operational.
importance_rationale: While significant for the venture ecosystem, the establishment of markets is an incremental change rather than a structural reform.
description: The establishment of three competing venture security markets in 2001 aims to encourage more start-ups and venture business operations.
source_quote: Three competing venture security markets now in full operation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving telecommunications infrastructure is expected to enhance connectivity and support economic activities, thereby fostering innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The reforms have been proposed and are in the announcement phase.
importance_rationale: While significant, the reforms focus on regulatory adjustments and infrastructure improvements rather than a complete overhaul of the system.
description: The Japanese government proposed public investment in network infrastructure to enhance telecommunications coverage in underserved regions, supporting private sector activities. Additionally, a national broadband initiative was announced to promote the deployment of high-speed and ultra-high-speed Internet infrastructure to enhance ICT use across the country. Special structural reform zones are to be established to identify and ease key regulations that hinder development, allowing local authorities to take initiative in regulatory reform.
source_quote: The government believes that ICT use will be a major force driving future growth and socio-economic developments and to this end has announced a national broadband initiative.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the investment environment and stimulating competition, the reform is expected to attract more foreign investment and enhance economic growth.
status_evidence: The amendment to the Gas Utility Law has been legislated to facilitate third-party access.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a major policy shift aimed at significantly increasing foreign investment in Japan.
description: The Japanese government has set an objective of doubling the stock of foreign direct investment (FDI) in Japan over a five-year period, drawing up an action plan with 74 items to improve the investment environment. This includes amending the Gas Utility Law to introduce regulated third-party access to gas pipelines and negotiate access to LNG terminals, aiming to stimulate competition and investment in the gas market.
source_quote: The amended Gas Utility Law will enter into force in April 2004, introducing regulated third party access to gas pipelines.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages private investment in startups, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The tax system was introduced to incentivize investments in venture companies.
importance_rationale: The reform significantly enhances the investment landscape for startups, promoting innovation and entrepreneurship.
description: The 'Angel Tax System' provides a 50% tax cut for capital gains from the sales of venture companies’ shares by individual investors under certain circumstances, aimed at encouraging investment in startups.
source_quote: The 'Angel Tax System' provides a 50% tax cut for capital gains from the sales of venture companies’ shares by individual investors under certain circumstances.

growth_orientation_rationale: By attracting outstanding talent and improving the education system, the strategy aims to enhance the skills of the workforce, which is essential for innovation and productivity growth.
status_evidence: The strategy was published and outlined various proposals for implementation.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a comprehensive approach to enhancing Japan's competitiveness through systemic reforms in human capital and education, which are critical for long-term economic growth.
description: In May 2006, the Council on Economic and Fiscal Policy published a 'Globalisation Strategy' aimed at enhancing Japan's international competitiveness through various reforms, including improvements in human resources and the education system.
source_quote: In May 2006, the Council on Economic and Fiscal Policy (CEFP) published a 'Globalisation Strategy' that aims at enhancing Japan’s international competitiveness.

growth_orientation_rationale: By promoting equal treatment of part-time workers, the reform aims to enhance job security and improve overall workforce productivity.
status_evidence: The 2007 revision of the Part-time Workers Law encourages balanced treatment of part-time workers.
importance_rationale: The revision represents a significant step towards improving the treatment of part-time workers, which is crucial for addressing labor market inequalities.
description: The government has introduced a number of policies to prevent discrimination against non-regular workers, including the 2007 revision of the Part-time Workers Law, which encourages balanced treatment of part-time workers relative to regular workers.
source_quote: The 2007 revision of the Part-time Workers Law encourages 'balanced treatment' of part-time workers relative to regular workers.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing childcare support is expected to increase female labor force participation, thereby contributing to economic growth.
component_name: Childcare and Family Care Leave Law Revision
status_evidence: The law was revised and took effect in 2010.
importance_rationale: The revision of the childcare leave law represents a significant step towards improving work-life balance and supporting female employment, which is crucial for addressing demographic challenges.
description: The government revised the Childcare and Family Care Leave Law in 2010, expanding childcare leave from 12 to 14 months if both parents take leave, and established additional leave for family care.
source_quote: The revision of the Childcare and Family Care Leave Law that took effect in 2010 expanded childcare leave from 12 to 14 months if both parents take leave.

growth_orientation_rationale: By targeting NEETs for employment, the initiative aims to enhance the labor force and reduce unemployment, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: The New Growth Strategy set an objective to place NEETs in jobs between FY2011 and FY2020.
importance_rationale: This initiative addresses a critical issue of youth unemployment and aims to integrate NEETs into the labor market, which is significant for long-term economic stability.
description: The New Growth Strategy aims to place 100,000 NEETs in jobs between FY2011 and FY2020 using 'Local Youth Support Stations'.
source_quote: The New Growth Strategy aims to place 100,000 NEETs in jobs between FY2011 and FY2020 using 'Local Youth Support Stations'.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reduction in corporate tax is expected to incentivize firms to invest more, thereby enhancing productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The corporate tax rate was officially reduced as part of the FY2011 tax reform.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in the tax system, aimed at enhancing the competitiveness of Japanese firms and stimulating economic activity.
description: The FY2011 tax reform included a significant reduction in the corporate tax rate from 40% to 35%, the first cut in 12 years, aimed at boosting domestic investment and employment.
source_quote: The corporate income tax rate is to be reduced from 40% to 35% in FY2011.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the cost of fossil fuels, the tax incentivizes the development and adoption of cleaner technologies, promoting innovation in the energy sector.
status_evidence: The government announced a plan to raise the tax rate on fossil fuel products.
importance_rationale: The planned increase in the carbon tax represents a significant shift in fiscal policy aimed at promoting environmental sustainability and innovation in energy technologies.
description: The government announced a plan to raise the tax rate on fossil fuel products, including oil and coal, in October 2011 as part of its strategy to implement a carbon tax.
source_quote: The government announced a plan to raise the tax rate on fossil fuel products, including oil and coal, in October 2011.

growth_orientation_rationale: The FIT programme is designed to stimulate investment in renewable energy, which can enhance energy security and contribute to economic growth.
status_evidence: The FIT programme has been successfully launched and is in operation.
importance_rationale: The FIT programme represents a major structural change in Japan's energy policy aimed at promoting renewable energy.
description: Japan launched a feed-in-tariff (FIT) programme in 2012, obligating general electric utilities to purchase electricity from renewable energy producers at a fixed long-term price, thereby promoting the development of renewable energy sources.
source_quote: In 2012, Japan launched a feed-in-tariff (FIT) programme, which obliges the general electric utilities to purchase electricity from almost all renewable energy producers to promote renewable energy.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the number of ECEC centres, the reform aims to meet unmet demand for childcare, thereby supporting working parents and enhancing early childhood education.
status_evidence: The government plans to increase the number of ECEC centres to 2000 by March 2013.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant gap in early childhood education and care, aiming to improve access and quality, which is crucial for child development and parental support.
description: The government plans to increase the number of 'Centres for ECEC' to 2000 by March 2013 by expanding financial support and simplifying administrative procedures, aiming to improve cooperation between childcare and kindergarten services.
source_quote: The government plans to increase the number of ECEC centres to 2000 by March 2013 by expanding financial support and unifying and simplifying administrative procedures.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to enhance Japan's business environment, potentially leading to increased innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The government launched two new initiatives in 2013.
importance_rationale: These initiatives represent a structural change in Japan's approach to economic and industrial policy, aiming to enhance competitiveness and innovation.
description: The government launched two new initiatives in 2013: the National Strategic Special Zones and the Industrial Competitiveness Council, aimed at reviewing economic and industrial policies, including regulatory reform.
source_quote: The government also launched two new initiatives in 2013: the National Strategic Special Zones and the Industrial Competitiveness Council.

growth_orientation_rationale: The act is designed to stimulate investment and innovation, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The act has been enacted and is in force.
importance_rationale: This act represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing Japan's industrial competitiveness and fostering innovation across various sectors.
description: The 2013 Industrial Competitiveness Enhancement Act aims to enhance Japan's economic growth by implementing regulatory reforms, encouraging investment in venture businesses, and promoting business restructuring through financial support.
source_quote: The three major components of the Act include: Accelerated regulatory reform, the renovation of industries, and encouraging investment in venture businesses.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating the exit of non-viable firms allows for better resource allocation, which can lead to increased productivity and firm entry.
status_evidence: The strategy was set with specific targets for firm exit and entry rates.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at improving productivity and resource allocation in the economy.
description: Japan has launched the Japan Revitalization Strategy, which aims to raise firm exit and entry rates to enhance productivity by ensuring that non-viable firms do not hinder the growth of more productive firms.
source_quote: The 2013 Japan Revitalization Strategy set a target of raising firm exit and entry rates from 4-5% to 10%.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates smoother firm exit and restructuring, thereby promoting entrepreneurship and the entry of new firms, which can enhance productivity.
status_evidence: The Guidelines were introduced and have been in use since 2014.
importance_rationale: The Guidelines represent a significant step towards improving the insolvency process for SMEs, which is crucial for fostering a more dynamic entrepreneurial environment.
description: The Guidelines for Personal Guarantees Provided by Business Owners were introduced to provide a common set of voluntary standards for self-regulation by SME groups and financial institution associations regarding guarantees by SME owners, aiming to expedite out-of-court settlements for debt resolution.
source_quote: The Guidelines expedite out-of-court settlements for debt resolution within a framework of institutionalised procedures.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in educational infrastructure enhances human capital and prepares students for a digital economy, which can drive future productivity growth.
status_evidence: The plan was launched with a specified budget and objectives.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in educational infrastructure, which is crucial for fostering a digitally literate workforce.
description: Japan launched a four-year plan to digitalise the educational environment, investing 671 billion yen to equip schools with computers, electronic blackboards, and education software, aiming to enhance IT literacy among students.
source_quote: In 2014, Japan launched a four-year plan, totalling 671 billion yen (USD 5.9 billion) to equip schools with more computers...

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the financial health of SMEs through better banking relationships can lead to improved access to finance and support for innovation.
status_evidence: The government has actively promoted relationship banking to support SMEs.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to improve the financing landscape for SMEs, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
description: The government is encouraging direct relations between SMEs and financial institutions to reduce information asymmetry, promoting a system of 'relationship banking' that has been well developed in Japan.
source_quote: The government is encouraging direct relations between SMEs and financial institutions, so-called 'relationship banking', to reduce the information asymmetry.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging entrepreneurship can lead to increased innovation and productivity, creating new job opportunities and enhancing economic growth.
status_evidence: Reforms to promote entrepreneurship are underway as part of the 2016 strategy.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses systemic issues in entrepreneurship, aiming to significantly increase the number of startups and enhance the overall business environment.
description: Japan is implementing reforms to promote entrepreneurship and firm creation, addressing regulatory barriers and improving the image of entrepreneurship to encourage more individuals to start businesses.
source_quote: Policies to encourage firm creation will help create new opportunities for displaced workers.

growth_orientation_rationale: By leveraging private finance initiatives, the plan aims to improve the efficiency of public infrastructure projects, which can lead to better service delivery and economic growth.
status_evidence: Projects have met their goals in most targeted areas.
importance_rationale: This action plan represents a significant shift towards utilizing private sector capabilities in public infrastructure, which is crucial for addressing Japan's ageing infrastructure challenges.
description: The government launched the PFI/PPP Action Plan in 2016, aiming to enhance infrastructure investment and maintenance efficiency through public-private partnerships, with a target of JPY 21 trillion in projects over FY 2013-22.
source_quote: The government launched the PFI/PPP Action Plan in 2016, which envisaged projects of JPY 21 trillion (3.8% of 2018 GDP) over FY 2013-22.

growth_orientation_rationale: By integrating digital technologies, the policy is expected to enhance productivity and create new business opportunities, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The policy package was announced and is being executed.
importance_rationale: This policy represents a significant shift towards leveraging digital technologies for economic growth, addressing critical labor market challenges, and enhancing productivity.
description: The New Economic Policy Package announced at the end of 2017 aims to double productivity growth to 2% by 2020, focusing on the integration of digital technologies and addressing labor shortages.
source_quote: The New Economic Policy Package announced at end-2017 set a goal of doubling productivity growth to 2% by 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing power generation efficiency and reducing emissions can lead to sustainable economic growth and innovation in energy technologies.
status_evidence: The government is actively promoting these technologies as part of its energy strategy.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards sustainable energy practices and innovation in Japan's energy sector, aligning with global climate commitments.
description: Japan is promoting the development of technologies to improve power generation efficiency and drastically reduce GHG emissions, including through carbon capture, utilisation and storage (CCUS).
source_quote: Japan is promoting the development of technologies to improve power generation efficiency and drastically reduce GHG emissions, in part through carbon capture, utilisation and storage (CCUS).

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to digital tools and resources, the initiative aims to enhance the digital skills of students, which is essential for future innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: By the end of March 2021, nearly all school districts were providing one computer per student.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change in the educational landscape, aiming to equip the next generation with essential digital skills for a rapidly evolving economy.
description: The GIGA School initiative was launched to ensure that every student in compulsory education has access to a computer or tablet connected to high-speed broadband, aiming to enhance digital skills and educational outcomes.
source_quote: The GIGA project aims to build an ICT environment to create a learning environment that leverages the best of new technologies and traditional approaches to pedagogy.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the skill set of the workforce, which is essential for driving innovation and productivity in the digital economy.
status_evidence: The strategy has been actively promoting training initiatives since its launch.
importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant effort to align workforce skills with emerging technological needs, which is crucial for maintaining competitiveness.
description: The Artificial Intelligence Strategy from 2019 supports training to increase the numbers of skilled workers in innovative industries, particularly in IT skills relevant to the digital transformation.
source_quote: The Artificial Intelligence Strategy from 2019 supports training to increase the numbers of skilled workers in innovative industries.

growth_orientation_rationale: These projects are expected to drive technological advancements and improve productivity across various sectors, contributing positively to economic growth.
status_evidence: Commercial services for 5G and other technologies began in 2020.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant shift towards integrating advanced technologies into society, aiming for comprehensive economic and social transformation.
description: Japan is promoting flagship projects to realize 'Society 5.0', which includes the implementation of automated mobility systems, data-driven healthcare, and smart energy management, aimed at enhancing productivity and sustainability.
source_quote: Promote such projects as: i) automated mobility systems; ii) data-driven healthcare systems; iii) smart energy management and finance.

growth_orientation_rationale: By investing in R&D and advanced technologies, the policy aims to boost innovation and productivity, which are essential for long-term economic growth.
status_evidence: The government adopted the new economic policy package in November 2021.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in R&D and advanced technologies, which is crucial for Japan's economic recovery and future growth.
description: The Japanese government adopted a new economic policy package aimed at enhancing R&D and investment in advanced technologies to promote digital transformation and green growth.
source_quote: The government adopted a new economic policy package...support to enhance R&D and investment in advanced technologies, thus promoting the digital transformation and green growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: The Digital Agency aims to enhance productivity in both public and private sectors through improved data governance and digital services, which can lead to cost reductions and better service delivery.
status_evidence: The Digital Agency was established with a dedicated staff and mandate.
importance_rationale: The establishment of the Digital Agency represents a significant structural change in Japan's approach to digital governance, with potential long-term impacts on productivity and public service efficiency.
description: The Japanese government established a new 'Digital Agency' in September 2021 to oversee digital transformation efforts across public sector organizations, aiming to improve data sharing and administrative efficiency.
source_quote: To address these issues, the Japanese government established a new 'Digital Agency' in September 2021, with a staff of 600 officials, including 200 ICT engineers.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering a vibrant start-up ecosystem, the plan is expected to enhance innovation and economic dynamism, contributing positively to GDP growth.
status_evidence: The plan was officially launched with allocated funding and specific targets.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change in Japan's approach to fostering innovation and entrepreneurship, with significant implications for economic growth and job creation.
description: The government introduced the Five-year Start-up Development Plan, aiming to increase start-up investment significantly and create a substantial number of new start-ups and unicorns by 2027.
source_quote: The Five-year Start-up Development Plan set a goal of increasing start-up investment by more than tenfold by FY2027.

growth_orientation_rationale: By easing collateral requirements, the reform aims to facilitate access to finance for innovative start-ups, thereby enhancing their growth potential and contribution to the economy.
status_evidence: The government aims to submit new legislation to introduce the possibility of incorporating intangible assets into collateral.
importance_rationale: This reform is a major shift in the financing landscape for start-ups, potentially unlocking significant capital for innovative ventures.
description: The government plans to reform the collateral system to improve financing conditions for start-ups by allowing new lending to be secured by the entirety of the business’ assets and future receivables.
source_quote: The government plans to reduce the use of personal guarantees as collateral, which can help improve financing conditions for start-ups.

growth_orientation_rationale: This reform aims to improve access to financing for innovative firms, facilitating their growth and contribution to the economy.
status_evidence: The government has committed to presenting a draft bill for growth financing.
importance_rationale: This reform is a significant change in financing policy that could greatly enhance the ability of innovative firms to secure necessary funding.
description: The government will present a draft bill allowing innovative firms to obtain growth financing from banks by pledging their entire business assets as collateral.
source_quote: The government will present a draft bill allowing innovative firms to obtain growth financing from banks by pledging their entire business assets as collateral.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing governance in start-ups is expected to attract more investment, thereby fostering innovation and growth in the sector.
status_evidence: The proposal has been made but not yet legislated or implemented.
importance_rationale: While significant, the proposal does not represent a structural change but rather an enhancement of existing governance frameworks.
description: A proposal has been made to allow venture investors to appoint directors to start-up companies, which aims to enhance governance and attract more investment in innovative firms.
source_quote: One proposal that is not controversial is to allow venture investors to appoint directors to a start-up company, which resembles cumulative voting.

growth_orientation_rationale: The shift towards FTAs is expected to enhance market access and competition, which can stimulate economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has publicly announced the shift towards FTAs.
importance_rationale: The initiation of bilateral FTAs represents a significant but narrower change in trade policy.
description: The government has initiated a shift towards bilateral free trade agreements (FTAs) to complement multilateral trade agreements, with negotiations nearly complete with Singapore, aiming to enhance market access and competition.
source_quote: During the past year the authorities have initiated a shift in policy away from an exclusive reliance on multilateral trade agreements towards bilateral free trade agreements (FTA).

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the removal of regulatory barriers, the initiative aims to enhance innovation and commercialization of new ideas.
status_evidence: The initiative has been announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The initiative is significant in promoting innovation but does not represent a major structural change.
description: The Kurume Research Park, a public-private joint venture, is encouraging companies to propose reforms to eliminate regulatory barriers that hinder innovative business ideas.
source_quote: The Kurume Research Park, a public-private joint venture, is pushing companies to propose specific reforms to remove rules that are blocking the realization of promising business ideas.

growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering the capital requirement for start-ups, the reform aims to facilitate the creation of new businesses and stimulate innovation.
status_evidence: The reform has been implemented, allowing for reduced capital requirements for start-ups.
importance_rationale: The reform is significant in promoting start-ups but does not represent a major overhaul of the system.
description: To encourage start-ups, the minimum requirement for capital has been tentatively reduced to 1 yen when certain conditions are satisfied, with the possibility of permanently abolishing this requirement under consideration.

This reform aims to improve the efficiency of public service delivery by enabling more processes to be conducted online.

importance_rationale: This plan represents a significant structural change aimed at improving the financial ecosystem, which is crucial for fostering innovation and investment in Latvia.
description: The government has initiated the Financial Sector Development Plan 2021-2023, which aims to address structural challenges in capital markets and promote investment culture, including support for fintech development.
source_quote: The government’s response to the structural challenges of overcoming the nation’s lag in capital markets and building a culture of investment, including in green finance, in part through supporting fintech development.

growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering collaboration across sectors, this initiative is expected to enhance the innovation ecosystem and improve responsiveness to emerging opportunities.
status_evidence: The project is ongoing throughout 2021 and 2022.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance innovation through collaboration, although it is part of a broader strategy rather than a standalone reform.
description: Latvia is developing approaches to stimulate anticipatory innovation through collaboration between businesses, research institutions, civil society, and government, aiming to enhance innovation strategies and coordinated actions.
source_quote: The OECD’s Observatory of Public Sector Innovation (OPSI) is developing approaches to stimulate anticipatory innovation in Latvia.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances competition and reduces costs for public contracts, benefiting both the public sector and innovative smaller firms.
status_evidence: The use of the electronic procurement platform is now mandatory for relevant tenders.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of procurement processes, enhancing efficiency and transparency across the public sector.
description: Latvia has introduced an electronic procurement platform that is mandatory for all levels of government for tenders above certain thresholds, improving transparency and reducing barriers for smaller firms.
source_quote: Latvia has considerably improved procurement procedures and their transparency by introducing an electronic procurement platform.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing competition in the banking sector is expected to lower lending rates and improve access to credit, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has proposed amendments to facilitate bank switching.
importance_rationale: The proposed amendments represent a significant step towards improving competition in the banking sector, which is crucial for enhancing credit availability.
description: The Latvian government proposed amendments to the Law on Consumer Protection and the Law on Credit Institutions to facilitate easier switching between banks by capping refinancing fees and streamlining the refinancing process.
source_quote: The government has proposed amendments to the Law on Consumer Protection and the Law on Credit Institutions, to make it easier for customers to switch banks.

growth_orientation_rationale: While the rebate aims to reduce borrowing costs, it may lead to higher fees elsewhere, complicating its overall impact on the economy.

importance_rationale: The introduction of mortgage interest rebates is a significant policy change aimed at improving affordability for borrowers, though its effectiveness may vary.
description: Amendments to the Consumer Rights Protection Law were adopted, introducing a levy on banks to provide mortgage interest rebates to borrowers, aimed at reducing the cost of borrowing.
source_quote: In December, the parliament adopted amendments to the Consumer Rights Protection Law, which introduced a levy on banks to provide mortgage interest rebates to borrowers.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing adult skills, especially in digital technologies, is expected to improve workforce productivity and innovation capacity.
status_evidence: The initiative is part of the Recovery and Resilience Facility plan.
importance_rationale: This initiative addresses a critical gap in adult digital skills, which is essential for improving overall productivity and innovation in the economy.
description: Latvia is developing the Individual Learning Accounts as part of its Recovery and Resilience Facility plan to facilitate access to online learning opportunities aimed at improving adult skills, particularly in digital areas.
source_quote: Latvia is developing the Individual Learning Accounts, an EU initiative that aims to facilitate access to online learning opportunities to improve adult skills.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the digital skills of employees, the initiative aims to boost productivity and innovation within firms.
status_evidence: The grants will support programmes to improve basic digital skills.
importance_rationale: This grant programme is a significant step towards enhancing workforce skills, which is crucial for fostering innovation in the economy.
description: The government plans to provide grants of EUR 30 million to improve the digital skills of employees in over 4,200 firms, covering up to 70% of training costs.
source_quote: The Ministry of Economy will provide grants of EUR 30 million covering up to 70% of the total training costs, to improve the digital skills of the employees of more than 4,200 entrepreneurs.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to finance for SMEs and improving competition in the financial system can stimulate innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government set medium-term policy priorities for capital market deepening until 2027.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change aimed at improving the financial ecosystem for SMEs, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic resilience.
description: The government has set medium-term policy priorities for capital market deepening until 2027, which includes facilitating the listing of SMEs on the stock market and conducting Initial Public Offerings (IPOs) for large state-owned enterprises.
source_quote: In May 2023, the government set medium-term policy priorities for capital market deepening until 2027, which includes facilitating the listing of SMEs on the stock market.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging international collaboration can enhance knowledge transfer and innovation, leading to improved research outcomes and economic growth.
status_evidence: Develop incentives for international cooperation in local research and innovation.
importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it aims to enhance Latvia's research landscape through international collaboration, which is vital for innovation.
description: Latvia aims to develop incentives for international cooperation in local research and innovation, alongside a regular external evaluation exercise.
source_quote: Develop incentives for international cooperation in local research and innovation as well as a regular external evaluation exercise.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing tax incentives, the reform aims to stimulate private sector R&D investment, which can lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The authorities have recently made the second tax incentive significantly more flexible and generous.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it modifies existing tax incentives to better support R&D activities, potentially increasing private sector engagement in innovation.
description: The Latvian government has reformed its tax incentives for R&D, making them more flexible and generous to encourage private sector investment in research.
source_quote: In response, the authorities have recently made the second tax incentive significantly more flexible and generous.

growth_orientation_rationale: Expanding work-based learning enhances the skills of students, making them more employable and better aligned with market demands, which supports economic growth.

importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly addresses skill shortages and improves the alignment of education with labor market needs.

source_quote: The government is working to expand work-based learning, but while student numbers are increasing, they remain low.

growth_orientation_rationale: By removing disincentives for growth and providing support for new firms, the reform is expected to enhance investment and productivity.
status_evidence: The government should phase out the microenterprise tax regime, considering its potentially negative impact on productivity growth.
importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant structural issue in the tax system that has widespread implications for firm growth and productivity, making it a major reform.
description: The government plans to phase out the microenterprise tax regime, which has been found to negatively impact productivity growth, and replace it with a targeted tax credit for new firms to encourage growth and investment.
source_quote: The government should phase out the microenterprise tax regime, considering its potentially negative impact on productivity growth.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the business environment and managerial skills is expected to enhance productivity and innovation, leading to increased exports and economic growth.
status_evidence: Latvia should improve the business environment for all firms and the governance of state-owned enterprises.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance the export capabilities of firms, which is crucial for Latvia's economic growth given its reliance on external markets.
description: Latvia aims to improve the business environment for firms by enhancing managerial skills, strengthening business networks, and concentrating export support on firms entering new markets.
source_quote: To promote export growth and diversification, Latvia should improve the business environment for all firms and the governance of state-owned enterprises.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing financial aid and flexibility in education is expected to enhance the skills and entrepreneurial capabilities of the workforce, fostering innovation.
status_evidence: Increasing financial aid for graduate students, giving schools more flexibility in setting wages.
importance_rationale: This plan is a significant step towards enhancing human capital, which is essential for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship in Latvia.
description: Latvia plans to increase financial aid for graduate students and provide schools with more flexibility in setting wages to boost the number of entrepreneurs and innovators.
source_quote: Increasing financial aid for graduate students, giving schools more flexibility in setting wages, exposing more students to advanced curricula.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital literacy and coding skills among students is expected to improve the future workforce's capabilities, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The new curriculum aims to develop digital literacy as a transversal skill across all study areas.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in educational priorities, focusing on essential skills for the digital economy, which is crucial for Latvia's future competitiveness.
description: Latvia is reforming its national curriculum to prioritize computational thinking and digital literacy, aiming to teach coding from primary school to address the low share of young adults with programming skills.
source_quote: Latvia is currently reforming its national curriculum to give computational thinking higher priority.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving health care access and efficiency contributes to a healthier workforce, which is vital for economic productivity.
status_evidence: The comprehensive health strategy has been in effect and is actively improving health care services.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the health sector, aiming for systemic improvements in health care delivery.

source_quote: The present administration has outlined a reform strategy in its Development Plan... The specific reform programme for the health sector provides more details.

growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages investment and job creation in the private sector, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.

description: The 1996 Budget included tax deductions for small- and medium-sized enterprises that expand investment or create jobs, aiming to stimulate productive investment and employment growth.
source_quote: Tax deductions in favour of small- and medium-size enterprises, as well as for all enterprises that expand investment or create jobs in 1996 on a wider scale than in 1995.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining tax administration can reduce compliance costs for businesses, potentially leading to increased investment and economic activity.
status_evidence: A Bill was sent to Congress to establish a Tax Administration Service.
importance_rationale: The reform aims to enhance the efficiency of tax collection and compliance, which is significant for the overall economic environment but does not constitute a major systemic change.
description: The 1996 Budget proposed simplified taxation for smaller enterprises and the establishment of a new autonomous Tax Administration Service to improve tax compliance and administration.
source_quote: A Bill was sent to Congress to establish a ‘Tax Administration Service’ as an autonomous public entity to take responsibility for all matters concerning tax and customs administration.

growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining procurement processes and reducing transaction costs, COMPRANET is expected to enhance public sector efficiency and accountability, ultimately supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The system became fully operational at the end of 1999.
importance_rationale: The implementation of COMPRANET represents a significant improvement in public procurement practices, enhancing transparency and efficiency in government operations.
description: The Electronic System of Government Procurement (COMPRANET) was developed to enhance the efficiency and transparency of public sector tendering, allowing for electronic submission of bids and public access to procurement information.
source_quote: COMPRANET has been developed by SECODAM as a universal, public-access system for carrying out public sector tendering.

growth_orientation_rationale: These measures aim to enhance access to financing and technological support, which are essential for the growth and productivity of small enterprises.
status_evidence: The specific programme for technological development in SMEs has been implemented, and COMPITE has been established and operational.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant but narrower changes aimed at supporting SMEs through financial and technological means.
description: The Mexican government has initiated measures to strengthen the microfinance sector, known as 'social banking', to improve access to financing for small enterprises, which are crucial for job creation and economic development. Additionally, initiatives have been launched to provide technological support to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) to enhance their management skills and production practices, particularly through the use of information and communications technologies (ICT). The National Committee for Productivity and Technological Innovation (COMPITE) was established to provide targeted counselling for micro-firms and SMEs, helping them improve productivity through efficient manufacturing methods.
source_quote: The National Committee for Productivity and Technological Innovation (COMPITE) started up in 1997. It provides specifically targeted counselling for micro-firms and SMEs, aimed at helping them to apply more efficient manufacturing methods and so improve their productivity.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in communication infrastructure is expected to enhance access to services and stimulate economic activity in underserved areas.
status_evidence: The project has been successfully implemented as planned.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a major investment in national infrastructure aimed at bridging the digital divide.
description: The e-Mexico project aims to eliminate the digital divide in Mexico by expanding communication infrastructure and providing government services to rural communities, with a commitment to spend 663 million pesos on various subprojects.
source_quote: To achieve the objectives of universal service and a greater coverage, a social fund to finance investment in infrastructure in poor areas was created in 2002.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying business registration is expected to encourage entrepreneurship and stimulate economic activity.
status_evidence: The system has been successfully implemented as planned.
importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is an administrative improvement rather than a structural change.

source_quote: Creation of SARE (Sistema de Apertura Rápida de Empresas), a new system to start a business within one day.

growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying administrative processes, the reform encourages entrepreneurship and innovation, which can boost economic growth.
status_evidence: The fast-track system has been successfully implemented to support startups.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant in enhancing the startup ecosystem but does not represent a major overhaul.
description: The introduction of a new fast-track system for start-ups (SARE) aims to reduce the complexity of administrative procedures, facilitating the creation of enterprises and significantly decreasing the time required to establish a business.
source_quote: The new fast-track system for start ups (SARE) developed since 2002 is helping to reduce the complexity of administrative procedures with a view to facilitate creation of enterprises.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing teacher quality and school infrastructure, the initiative is expected to improve educational outcomes, which can lead to higher productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The initiative was officially announced and has been in effect since 2008.
importance_rationale: The Alianza represents a comprehensive approach to reforming the education system, addressing multiple weaknesses and aiming for systemic change in teacher quality and school performance.
description: The Alianza for Quality Education aims to improve the quality of education in Mexico through various initiatives, including school modernization, teacher professionalization, and curriculum reform.
source_quote: In May 2008 President Calderón announced a voluntary agreement between the government and the 1.5 million member teachers’ union to improve the quality of education in Mexico.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to stimulate private investment and improve infrastructure, which can lead to increased economic activity and growth.
status_evidence: The PPP Law has been successfully adopted and is currently in force.

description: The adoption of the PPP Law in 2012 enhances private investment through public-private partnerships, aiming to improve infrastructure financing and efficiency.
source_quote: The adoption of the PPP Law in 2012 is another step towards enhancing private investment through public-private partnerships.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing financial inclusion and access to banking services is expected to support entrepreneurship and innovation.

status_evidence: The reforms have been officially announced but are not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant overhaul of the banking sector aimed at increasing access and inclusion.
description: In January 2019, the government announced a package of reforms aimed at deepening the banking sector and increasing financial inclusion, which includes the development of a smartphone platform for cost-free electronic payments and allowing minors to open bank accounts.
source_quote: In January 2019 the government announced a package of reforms to deepen the banking sector and stock market and increase financial inclusion.

growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to enhance access to financial services, which can stimulate economic activity and improve quality of life in underserved areas.
status_evidence: The initiatives have been launched and are currently operational.
importance_rationale: While these initiatives are significant, they do not represent a structural overhaul of the financial system.
description: Mexico has launched initiatives aimed at improving financial inclusion in marginalized communities, including the creation of the Banco Bienestar to provide access to financial services in remote areas and the Central Bank's platform Cobro Digital (CoDi) to facilitate digital payments, although the latter has faced limited adoption due to communication issues.
source_quote: Sembrando Vida aims at improving the quality of life of people in marginalized rural communities and promoting sustainable development.

growth_orientation_rationale: This policy aims to enhance financial access and literacy, which can lead to increased economic participation and growth.
status_evidence: The policy has been officially established and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This policy represents a significant structural change in how financial services are accessed and utilized in Mexico.
description: Mexico established the National Policy for Financial Inclusion in 2020 to increase access to financial services, particularly for low-income households, and to promote financial literacy.
source_quote: Mexico established in 2011 the National Council for Financial Inclusion and in 2016 the National Policy for Financial Inclusion, then updated in 2020.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining identification processes can facilitate access to financial services and improve overall economic participation.
status_evidence: The digital identity document and registry have been established and are in use.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant advancement in the digital infrastructure for financial services.
description: Mexico has created a digital identity document and a digital National Population Registry to streamline identification and verification processes for accessing digital financial products, enhancing consumer protection and reducing administrative burdens.
source_quote: In 2020 the government created a digital identity document, to be used in all public administrations, and a digital National Population Registry.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying regulations can lower barriers to entry for consumers, promoting greater financial inclusion and economic activity.
status_evidence: The simplification of regulations has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant but does not represent a major overhaul of the financial system.
description: The government simplified regulations on digital onboarding to include more institutions and facilitate remote account opening, enhancing access to financial services for a broader range of consumers.
source_quote: In 2020 the CNBV simplified the regulation on digital onboarding and extended its scope, by including corporates.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure is essential for enhancing connectivity, which can drive economic growth and innovation.
status_evidence: Both programs have been launched and are operational.

description: The Mexican government launched the 'Programa de Cobertura Social 2021-21' and the 'Internet para todos' programme to establish telecommunication networks and extend public digital infrastructure coverage, aiming to increase internet access for underserved populations.
source_quote: The programme 'Internet para todos' aims at extending the coverage of the public digital infrastructure from the current 70% to the whole country.

growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to improve living conditions and access to housing, which can enhance overall productivity and social mobility.

description: Mexico's government has reformed its national housing policy to enhance access to adequate housing for all citizens, focusing on low-income households and improving policy coordination.
source_quote: The government recently reformed the national housing policy and its governance to facilitate access to adequate housing to all Mexicans.

growth_orientation_rationale: The taxonomy encourages investment in sustainable activities, potentially leading to increased capital flows towards environmentally and socially responsible projects.

description: Mexico has launched the first taxonomy in the world that covers both environmental and social objectives, providing transparent definitions of sustainable activities for financial players and companies.
source_quote: Mexico has launched the first world taxonomy that covers both environmental and social activities to provide transparent and consistent definitions to investors.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving SMEs' access to resources and markets, the initiative is expected to enhance productivity and competitiveness, contributing positively to economic growth.

source_quote: A new policy package has been launched (Mano a mano, in Spanish) to support SMEs’ institutional, digital and financial inclusion.

growth_orientation_rationale: The proposed reforms aim to enhance competition and efficiency in the electricity market, which could lead to lower prices and improved service delivery.

growth_orientation_rationale: By restructuring CFE into smaller autonomous units, the initiative aims to foster competition and improve efficiency in the electricity sector.

description: The ongoing reorganisation of the Comisión Federal de Electricidad (CFE) aims to create a 'shadow' energy market where all participants function under the same commercial principles, facilitating competition.
source_quote: The ongoing reorganisation has started at CFE (approved by the CFE board in October 1999).

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to knowledge and education is expected to enhance human capital and productivity.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.

description: The Mexican government aims to give citizens opportunities to access knowledge and education through the intelligent use of technologies, including reforms to support the use of electronic and IT media.
source_quote: Give Mexicans opportunities to access knowledge, learning and education by means of an intelligent use of technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating private sector entry into electricity generation is expected to enhance efficiency and innovation in the sector.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the electricity sector.
description: The Mexican government proposed a new regulation for the electricity sector to create market conditions, allowing private producers to enter the generation market while maintaining state control over transmission and distribution.
source_quote: The reform proposed by the previous administration in 1999... was not approved by Congress. In 2002, the current administration submitted a new proposal to Congress, which is less ambitious than the previous one.

growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating linkages between small and large firms, the programme enhances the capacity of SMEs to innovate and commercialize their products, contributing to economic growth.

description: The government assists small firms in developing linkages with large firms through the Supplier Development Programme (SDP), which has helped form strategic alliances between large foreign firms and SME suppliers.
source_quote: The government assists small firms in developing linkages with large firms, in particular through the Supplier Development Programme (SDP).

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining business registration processes encourages entrepreneurship and formalization, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has announced plans for the integration of SARE with tuempresa.gob.mx.
importance_rationale: The integration of SARE with tuempresa.gob.mx represents a significant but narrower reform aimed at improving the business environment.
description: Mexico has made significant progress in easing procedures to start a business through the launch of the Sistema de Apertura Rápida de Empresas (SARE), which has streamlined registration processes for low-risk businesses. Additionally, the government plans to integrate SARE with tuempresa.gob.mx, an electronic one-stop shop to ease compliance with federal business start-up regulations, significantly reducing the time required for registration.
source_quote: Mexico has made significant progress in easing procedures to start a business, including through the launch in 2002 of the Sistema de Apertura Rápida de Empresas (SARE).

growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing hiring and firing costs can encourage formal employment, which supports economic growth.

source_quote: The reform is still under discussion in Congress, but if it were implemented along the lines of the original proposal, this would ease the burden of employment protection legislation quite substantially.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining regulatory procedures is expected to facilitate entrepreneurship and innovation.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing human capital and fostering innovation are expected to raise productivity and economic growth.

source_quote: Given a favourable overall cost level and a low corporate taxation, small and medium-sized enterprises may be best served by simplifying both the tax code and the wide array of government support schemes.

growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting SMEs and entrepreneurship is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The government has successfully implemented various measures to support SMEs and entrepreneurship.

source_quote: The ALMI Business Partner company, which is owned by the government, and 22 regional development companies owned by county councils, offer consultation, financing and information to persons planning to start a new business.

Additionally, a proposed guideline bill on individual learning and skills development aims to establish individual learning accounts to encourage personal investment in education and training.
source_quote: The Adult Education Initiative (AEI) is a major programme designed to redress the skills gap in Sweden and is aimed primarily at adults who are unemployed or who lack full three-year upper secondary qualifications.

This reform aims to facilitate the combination of work and family life while increasing job availability for low-skilled workers.
source_quote: Since July 2007, each adult can claim a tax deduction worth half of what is paid for household work in the person’s own or parents’ home up to a limit of 15% of average full-time earnings.
