status_evidence: A credit guarantee to be established for the commercialization of innovative projects.
importance_rationale: This reform is important as it directly addresses financing challenges faced by innovative firms, enhancing their growth potential.
description: A credit guarantee will be established to support the commercialization of innovative projects, facilitating access to financing for startups and innovative firms.
source_quote: A credit guarantee to be established for the commercialization of innovative projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: Establishing a dedicated council can lead to more informed policy decisions that enhance productivity, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: Consider creating A Productivity Council with a broad mandate to assess all relevant structural and policy drivers of productivity growth.
importance_rationale: The establishment of a Productivity Council is a significant reform aimed at improving productivity assessment and policy recommendations, which is vital for economic development.
description: The Turkish government aims to create a Productivity Council to assess structural and policy drivers of productivity growth and issue recommendations.
source_quote: Consider creating A Productivity Council with a broad mandate to assess all relevant structural and policy drivers of productivity growth in Turkey and to issue policy recommendations.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving transparency and efficiency in business support programs is expected to enhance the effectiveness of innovation incentives.
status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is more about improving existing systems rather than introducing a major new initiative.
description: The Turkish government plans to introduce a comprehensive Incentive and Aid Information System to streamline business support programs and enhance transparency and efficiency.
source_quote: The development of such a system goes hand in hand with plans to form a comprehensive legal and regulatory framework for aid and simplifying the current structure.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving education and vocational skills is expected to enhance the overall skill level of the workforce, thereby supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: Both initiatives have been successfully implemented as of 1994.
importance_rationale: These initiatives represent a major reform in the education system aimed at workforce development.
description: The 'Goals 2000' initiative and the 'School-to-Work Opportunities Act' aim to improve the quality of the education system and enhance workforce skills by establishing national standards and providing seed money for vocational education improvements.
source_quote: Goals 2000 seeks to improve the quality of the education system in a variety of ways, including the creation of 'voluntary' national standards for initial education and for vocational skills.

growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating connections between entrepreneurs and investors enhances the startup ecosystem, promoting innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: The ACE-Net initiative has been launched and is operational.
importance_rationale: While beneficial, this initiative is a minor adjustment to existing support mechanisms for startups.
description: The Small Business Administration (SBA) initiated the Angel Capital Electronic Network (ACE-Net), a nationwide Internet listing of small innovative companies aimed at facilitating connections between entrepreneurs and angel investors.
source_quote: In setting up the ACE-Net, State Securities Administrators agreed to remove restrictions on inter-state trading of unregistered stocks of those companies which are on the ACE-Net.

growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in climate change research and alternative energy sources is expected to foster innovation and economic growth in sustainable technologies.
status_evidence: The commitment to the Kyoto Protocol has been made but specific initiatives are still in the planning stages.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to addressing climate change through dedicated research funding.
description: The United States signed the international Kyoto Protocol to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, committing to a budget for climate change initiatives and research on alternative energy sources.
source_quote: In November 1998, the United States signed the international pact negotiated in Kyoto the year before to reduce greenhouse gas emissions to 7 per cent below 1990 levels in 2008-12.

growth_orientation_rationale: By providing broader tax deductions, this act encourages domestic production and export, fostering innovation and competitiveness.
status_evidence: The act has been enacted and is currently operational.
importance_rationale: This act represents a significant overhaul of tax policy affecting international trade and domestic production.
description: The Extraterritorial Income Exclusion Act was introduced, replacing the previous foreign sales corporation regime, allowing broader tax deductions for domestic goods produced for export.
source_quote: The law gives the same tax exemptions to goods that are produced domestically for export as to goods that are made and sold abroad by US companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing small businesses to invest in R&D, this reform is expected to enhance innovation and productivity.
status_evidence: The modification of the research credit has been enacted and is currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform modifies existing tax credits to better support small businesses, representing a significant but not transformative change.
description: The research credit was modified to provide up to $25,000 of new capital equipment deductions for small businesses with profits below $200,000, aiming to stimulate R&D investment.
source_quote: The cost of the research credit is expected to be $6.1 billion in 2001.

growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the reliability of financial reporting, the reform aims to enhance investor confidence, which can lead to increased investment and economic growth.
status_evidence: The Sarbanes-Oxley Act was signed into law in 2002.
importance_rationale: The Sarbanes-Oxley Act represents a major overhaul of corporate governance and financial reporting standards, addressing systemic issues revealed by high-profile corporate scandals.
description: The Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002 introduced significant reforms to enhance the accuracy of corporate financial statements and established a new oversight body for accountants, aiming to restore investor confidence in financial reporting.
source_quote: The Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002 created a new oversight body to supervise accountants, tightened the responsibility of corporate officers for financial reports and stiffened penalties.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing corporate governance can lead to increased investor confidence and potentially higher levels of investment in innovation.
status_evidence: The act has been in force since its enactment.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in corporate governance.
description: The Sarbanes-Oxley Act was enacted to enhance corporate governance and accountability in response to financial scandals, increasing penalties for fraud and improving disclosure requirements for public companies.
source_quote: The 2002 Sarbanes-Oxley Act stiffened penalties for fraud, enhanced both auditor independence and regulation of the accounting profession and increased both disclosure requirements for public companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Improving energy infrastructure and reliability supports economic growth by ensuring a stable energy supply, which is crucial for productivity.
status_evidence: The Energy Policy Act was enacted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in energy policy and infrastructure.
description: The Energy Policy Act of 2005 aims to improve the country’s electricity grid and enhance energy efficiency while establishing an Electric Reliability Organisation to enforce mandatory reliability standards for the electric transmission system. This comprehensive approach is designed to reduce reliance on foreign energy sources and strengthen the overall reliability of the energy supply.
source_quote: The Energy Policy Act of 2005 aims at improving the country’s electricity grid, expanding the diversity of energy supply and enhancing energy efficiency.

growth_orientation_rationale: Research on breakthrough technologies can lead to significant advancements in environmental sustainability and economic efficiency.
status_evidence: The Climate Change Plan was enacted and is currently in force.
importance_rationale: The plan represents a major commitment to addressing climate change through targeted research.
description: The Administration's Climate Change Plan aims to cut the emissions intensity of output by 18% over the next ten years, promoting research on breakthrough technologies such as carbon sequestration.
source_quote: The Administration's Climate Change Plan, issued in 2002, aims at cutting the emissions intensity of output by 18% over the following ten years.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing the adoption of clean technologies, the policy aims to stimulate innovation and investment in the energy sector, which can lead to long-term economic benefits.
status_evidence: The Act has been enacted and its provisions are in effect.
importance_rationale: The Act represents a significant overhaul of energy policy, aiming to promote clean energy technologies through substantial financial incentives.
description: The Energy Policy Act of 2005 introduced tax breaks to accelerate the market penetration of advanced, clean-energy technologies and provided loan guarantees for early commercial projects that utilize these technologies.
source_quote: The Energy Policy Act of 2005 introduced or expanded tax breaks to accelerate market penetration of advanced, clean-energy technologies.

growth_orientation_rationale: By mandating the use of advanced bio-fuels, this reform aims to stimulate innovation in renewable energy technologies and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
status_evidence: The Renewable Fuels Standard was substantially revised to increase the use of bio-fuels.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant policy shift towards renewable energy, with implications for both environmental sustainability and energy innovation.
description: The Energy Independence and Security Act of 2007 revised the Renewable Fuels Standard to increase the use of bio-fuels, setting mandatory life-cycle GHG emissions thresholds and requiring a gradual increase in bio-fuel production.
source_quote: The Renewable Fuels Standard was substantially revised in The Energy Independence and Security Act of 2007 to give increased weight to bio-fuels that are more effective in reducing GHG emissions.

growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills and employability of unemployed individuals, the reform aims to reduce long-term unemployment and improve overall labor market outcomes.
package_name: Middle Class Tax Relief and Job Creation Act
status_evidence: The Act was passed and included new requirements for unemployment compensation recipients.
importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in the approach to unemployment compensation, focusing on re-employment services, which can have a meaningful impact on labor market participation.
description: The Middle Class Tax Relief and Job Creation Act of 2012 introduced a requirement for Extended Unemployment Compensation recipients to receive eligibility assessments and re-employment services, including skills assessments and a re-employment plan.
source_quote: The Middle Class Tax Relief and Job Creation Act of 2012 added a requirement that all Extended Unemployment Compensation (EUC) recipients receive eligibility assessments and re-employment services.

growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the tax credit and simplifying its use, the reform is expected to incentivize more firms to invest in R&D, thereby fostering innovation.
status_evidence: The proposal was included in the President’s FY2013 budget.
importance_rationale: This reform is a major change to the R&E tax credit system, which is crucial for encouraging private sector R&D investment.
description: The President proposed reforms to the Research and Experimentation (R&E) tax credit to increase its value and make it permanent, aiming to enhance business R&D investments.
source_quote: The President has proposed that Congress consider changes in the federal tax code to encourage manufacturers to produce in the United States.

growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing businesses to hire skilled graduates, the reform aims to improve workforce quality and productivity, which can enhance overall economic growth.
status_evidence: The proposed FY2017 budget includes this tax credit initiative.
importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to link education and employment, which is crucial for addressing skills gaps in the labor market.
description: The proposed FY2017 budget includes a community college partnership tax credit aimed at encouraging businesses to hire graduates from community and technical colleges, thereby enhancing employer engagement in education and training pathways.
source_quote: The proposed FY2017 budget also calls for a community college partnership tax credit.

growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying the tax system and reducing distortions can encourage investment and innovation.
status_evidence: The tax reforms were enacted and are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the tax system.
description: The tax reforms introduced in late 2017 significantly reduced marginal statutory tax rates for personal and corporate income, aiming to simplify the tax system and reduce embedded distortions, which is expected to spur greater investment.
source_quote: The main thrust of the reforms reduced marginal statutory tax rates for personal and corporate income, which combined with simplification will reduce distortions embedded in the tax system and spur greater investment.

growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting economic development and enhancing worker mobility fosters entrepreneurship and innovation.
status_evidence: The support mechanisms and reforms to non-compete agreements are currently in effect.
importance_rationale: These reforms are significant in promoting entrepreneurship but do not represent a systemic overhaul.
description: The federal government, through the Comprehensive Economic Development Strategy run by the Department of Commerce’s Economic Development Administration, provides support for economic development plans, enhancing coordination and limiting the enforceability of non-compete agreements to improve worker mobility and entrepreneurship.
source_quote: The federal government through the Comprehensive Economic Development Strategy run by the Department of Commerce’s Economic Development Administration can provide support for economic development plans.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the unemployment insurance system can improve job matching and support active labour market policies, which are essential for economic recovery and resilience.
status_evidence: Funding was allocated for modernising the unemployment insurance system.
importance_rationale: The reform addresses significant shortcomings in the unemployment insurance system, aiming to enhance its effectiveness and link it with active labour market policies, which is crucial for economic stability.
description: The administration set aside US$2 billion for modernising the unemployment insurance system, aiming to improve administrative capacity and integrate benefit payments with active labour market services.
source_quote: The administration set aside US$2 billion for modernising the unemployment insurance system in the American Rescue Plan in early 2021.

growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining permitting processes can enhance the efficiency of renewable energy project implementation, supporting economic growth.
status_evidence: The initiatives have been established and are operational.
importance_rationale: While important for project efficiency, this initiative does not represent a major overhaul of innovation policy.
description: The federal government has established initiatives to promote closer coordination between agencies undertaking environmental reviews for renewable energy projects, aiming to streamline permitting processes and reduce delays.
source_quote: The authorities have established initiatives to promote closer coordination between agencies undertaking environmental reviews for renewable energy projects.

growth_orientation_rationale: While tightening regulation may reduce risks, it could also limit the availability of financing for innovation in housing.
status_evidence: The proposals have been made but not yet legislated.
importance_rationale: The proposals represent a significant change in the regulatory framework for housing finance.
description: Proposals have been made to tighten the regulation and supervision of government-sponsored housing finance companies, Freddie Mac and Fannie Mae, to eliminate their special status and implicit government guarantees.
source_quote: The Administration has made proposals to improve regulation and supervision of government-sponsored housing finance companies.

growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public funding for energy-related RD&D can stimulate innovation and technological advancements, leading to more efficient energy solutions and economic growth.
status_evidence: Public spending on energy-related RD&D has increased in recent years.
importance_rationale: While the increase in funding is significant, it is still low relative to the needs for energy innovation, making it a meaningful but not transformative reform.
description: Public spending on energy-related research, development, and demonstration (RD&D) has increased in recent years, although it remains low compared to other OECD countries.
source_quote: Public spending on energy-related RD&D has increased in recent years but remains low.

growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing STEM education is vital for building a skilled workforce that can drive innovation and economic growth.
status_evidence: Tertiary education attainment in STEM fields needs to be increased.
importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it targets the foundational education necessary for future innovation and economic competitiveness.
description: To increase STEM education attainment, the government emphasizes the need for improved access to quality secondary education to better prepare students for tertiary studies in STEM fields.
source_quote: An important step in doing so is improving access to quality secondary education so that students are better prepared for STEM tertiary studies.

growth_orientation_rationale: While the reform aims to normalize housing finance, it may create financial pressures that could hinder investment in GSEs.
status_evidence: The reform has been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the regulatory framework for GSEs.
description: The tax reform enacted in late-2017 is expected to put government-sponsored enterprises (GSEs) under financial pressure due to a reduction in the corporate tax rate, which will trigger a large write-down on their tax-deferred assets. The reform aims to normalize housing finance by recommending the privatization of GSEs and subjecting them to the same regulations as other mortgage-backed securities issuers.
source_quote: The last Economic Survey recommended leaving the securitisation of mortgages to the private sector.
